original_title: YAG-102 Cheeky JK Outdoor Training Chigusa Hara
overview: School girls are impertinent even if they are honor students. He doesn't know the setbacks and hardships, and he's scorned by the world. Moreover, when it comes to being a good-looking and boxed girl, there is nothing to be afraid of anymore. Chigusa, who has such a cheeky air, had trouble with her school teachers and male classmates. But I knew. Such a girl will rebel at first when she is scolded, but if she is further humiliated, she will suddenly become shy and obedient. [* There is some disturbance in the image and sound]
